hero.subtitle: Costa Rican company specialized in the production and export of vegetables, roots and tubers to the international market.

products.subtitle: Roots, tubers and vegetables selected under the highest standards of quality and food safety.
products.closing_note: These are just some of our products. We also handle many more varieties and presentations tailored to each client's needs.

about.label: About Us
about.title: We Are Tubertico
about.headline: Over 20 years connecting Costa Rican producers with markets around the world.
about.description: We are a Costa Rican company specialized in the production, selection and export of fresh vegetables, roots and tubers. We work directly with growers across Costa Rica to guarantee full traceability in every shipment.
about.description2: Our products meet the most demanding food safety standards. With active GlobalGAP and FSMA certifications, we supply buyers in the United States and Europe with confidence.
about.pillar_quality_desc: Rigorous selection under GlobalGAP and FSMA standards. Full traceability from field to final destination.
about.pillar_origin_desc: Cultivated on our farms in Costa Rica, selected for their rich soils and ideal agroclimatic conditions.
about.pillar_export_desc: We export to markets in the USA and Europe with cold chain, phytosanitary documentation and full regulatory compliance.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Our facilities, processes and products.
gallery.closing_note: Didn't find what you were looking for? Contact us directly and we'll be happy to share photos, specifications, and availability.
